LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.EnableAdvisor.D: When enabled, AI will choose the next action for colonists based on their state and personality.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.ShowThoughtBubb: Display the AI's reasoning for choosing an action above the colonist.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.CustomPrompt: Custom System Prompt (inserted after system messages)
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.EnableIdleTrigg: When a colonist has no work, AI will proactively choose their next action.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.EnableMoodTrigg: When a colonist's mood is too low, AI will prioritize actions that improve their mood.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.PawnScanInterva: Frequency of scanning for idle colonists. Lower values are more responsive but have higher performance cost.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.MoodThreshold.D: Triggers AI advisor when a colonist's mood falls below this percentage.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.RequestCooldown: Minimum interval between AI requests for the same colonist.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.MaxConcurrent.D: Maximum number of simultaneous AI requests. Higher values improve responsiveness but increase API costs.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.RequestExpire.D: Approval floating window expiry time. Requests not responded to within this time are automatically dismissed.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.NoTriggerWarnin: Warning: No trigger source enabled. AI Advisor will not activate automatically.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.RiskWithoutAppr: Warning: Approval system is off. Risk blocking will not take effect; all actions execute directly.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.EnableRequestSy: Enable request system (colonist requests require player approval)
When enabled, colonists can proactively submit action requests that require player approval before execution.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.EnableRiskAppro: Enable risk blocking (high-risk actions require player approval)
When enabled, actions at or above the risk threshold are automatically blocked and require player approval.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Settings.AutoBlockRiskLe: Actions at or above this risk level are automatically blocked and require player approval.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.UI.Gizmo.Desc: When enabled, AI will choose the next action for this colonist when idle.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.UI.Gizmo.ForceRequestDes: Bypass cooldown and request immediately (dev mode only)
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.WorkSectionHeader: [Work Tasks] (action must be assign_work, param fills WorkType defName in parentheses; can add @x,z for coordinates) [Low Risk]
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.InstantSectionHea: [Instant Actions] (action fills the intentId in parentheses; outside parentheses is description)
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.EatFoodHint: Available food: {0}; param fill food defName (e.g. Chocolate)
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.TaskInstruction.R: You are a colony advisor. Recommend actions for the colonist described below — manage only this one colonist.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.TaskInstruction.G: Based on the current state and available actions, provide the most reasonable advice.
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.TaskInstruction.P: 1. Examine current state (mood, health, skills, equipment) 2. Check colony needs and priorities 3. Evaluate candidate actions against personality 4. Choose the most fitting action
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.TaskInstruction.C: Only recommend actions available in the candidate list; consider the colonist's current state and needs; prioritize urgent situations (low mood, health issues, etc.)
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.TaskInstruction.O: Use Tool Calling (function calls) to output actions. Each available action corresponds to a tool/function — call the matching function directly.\n\nIf Tool Calling is unavailable, fallback to JSON: {"advices":[{"action":"action_name","target":"target_name","param":"params","reason":"reasoning"}]}
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.TaskInstruction.F: Tool Calling rules: - Each available action is a tool/function; call by matching function name to action ID - param: assign_work fills WorkType defName (e.g. Mining); move_to fills "x,z" coordinates; leave empty for others - The returned reason field will be displayed in the colonist's thought bubble
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.TaskInstruction.O: Output count rules: - Work tasks (assign_work): can queue multiple (advices array has multiple elements, executed in order) - Instant actions (force_rest / social_relax etc.): usually only 1 needed - Mixed advice (work + instant): write instant actions first, then work tasks
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.TaskInstruction.R: Risk control: - Actions marked [High] or [Danger] in the candidate list are higher risk - Prefer low or medium risk actions when not necessary - Avoid triggering high-risk actions (e.g. inspire series, drop_weapon) in normal situations
LanguageData.RimMind.Advisor.Prompt.TaskInstruction.D: Diversity hints: - Try to ensure diverse requests, avoid submitting the same type of request repeatedly - If similar requests have been approved or rejected recently, try a different type of action
